explanation: The user wants all potatoes to be placed in the cabinet. First, I need to pick up each potato, open the cabinet, place the potato inside, and repeat for all potatoes. After placing all potatoes, I close the cabinet to ensure it is secure. Since the user did not specify how many potatoes there are, I assume there are at least two (potato_0 and potato_1) based on common usage and the pattern in similar tasks like 'put all potatoes in the cabinet'.
